description: Convert the pre-drafted residential building shell into a fully functional dental office. The layout must include at least 3 treatment operatories, a reception/waiting area, a sterilization zone, a staff break room, and restrooms. Use partition walls and at least 4 doors to divide the floor plan into these distinct clinical and administrative zones. Each operatory must be furnished with a dental chair, a cabinet or shelf unit, and a lamp. The reception area requires a desk, at least 6 waiting chairs, and 2 side tables. The sterilization zone must include at least 3 shelf units, and the staff break room must contain a table, chairs, and at least 1 appliance. Install at least 2 toilets and 2 sinks across the facility. Identify at least 5 zones with text labels (e.g., "Operatory 1", "Reception", "Sterilization", "Staff Break Room", "Restroom") and save all changes to the project file.
